core_mechanism: a sign-reversal of an association between the individual (entity) level and the population-aggregate level on a shared latent bipolar axis, i.e. entities scoring high on a trait individually load one way while the same trait's collective/aggregate loading points the opposite way — an ecological / Simpson's-paradox aggregation reversal over latent coordinate embeddings
brief_reason: Individual items with the highest score on the trait present positive primary coordinates (Heroes, Angels, Adventurers), yet regressing the trait itself across the whole population yields a strong loading in the opposite direction (toward Fool), so the entity-level and aggregate-level associations have opposite sign.
